creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
The update is very simple:

--- Makefile    (revision 439493)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      biopython
-PORTVERSION=   1.68
+PORTVERSION=   1.69
 CATEGORIES=    biology python
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.biopython.org/DIST/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 439493)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1474421232
-SHA256 (biopython-1.68.tar.gz) = d1dc09d1ddc8e90833f507cf09f80fa9ee1537d319058d                            1c44fe9c09be3d0c1f
-SIZE (biopython-1.68.tar.gz) = 14445813
+TIMESTAMP = 1493017763
+SHA256 (biopython-1.69.tar.gz) = 169ffa90c3d3ec5678c7a5c99501c0cfeb54c40ca51a61                            9ce6cee5026d3403eb
+SIZE (biopython-1.69.tar.gz) = 15362359
